title: The Hotel Balcony
content: When Ethan entered his hotel room, the first thing he noticed was the balcony. It overlooked the city and offered an impressive view of historic buildings and busy streets below. Every morning, he stepped outside with a cup of coffee and watched the city wake up. In the evenings, he relaxed there after sightseeing and enjoyed the cooler air. Sometimes he simply sat quietly and admired the lights appearing across the skyline. The balcony became his favorite part of the hotel during the trip.
